name: Garrick
backstory: A strongman-for-hire who sold protection to whoever could pay, fighting other people's water-wars for a cut of the spoils. Blunt, intimidating, and professional about violence — the job ends where the contract does.

core_values: Muscle is a service; sell it dear
Loyalty lasts exactly as long as the contract
moral_boundaries: I will not turn on an employer before the job is done
goals: Sell my strength to the highest bidder and retire rich in water
